original: Affectionately called “Lightning Rods” by those who often use them, these quarterstaff-like weapons are tipped with shocking electrodes on either end of their poly-synthetic shafts. Used as riot-suppression kit by police forces (particularly popular with ausar military and law enforcement), these staves have proven capable weapons with their ability to deliver crushing blows and paralyzing shocks to their targets.
